response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, seasoned full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship values, real high-throughput systems exposure, and recent AI-tooling work, but the resume shows no experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of this role. There is also little evidence of principal-level scope: no multi-team platform ownership, no architecture leadership across workstreams, and career progression has stayed at senior/staff IC on small-to-mid product teams. The gap between the role's IC6 experimentation-systems mandate and the candidate's generalist product-engineering background is too wide.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Low-latency, high-scale production experience (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and recent AI-agent/MCP tooling work
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flighting, telemetry-platform, or growth-measurement experience anywhere in the resume
No demonstrated principal-level leadership: no multi-team initiatives, platform ownership, or org-wide architectural influence
Limited depth in statistical/experimental analysis; data aptitude is asserted only indirectly

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals at scale
